title: gomphostemma phlomoides
intro: Gomphostemma phlomoides, a species of flowering plant in the mint family, is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It is commonly known as "Himalayan Gomphostemma" and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are beneficial for the treatment of various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems. Gomphostemma phlomoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
